scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:js && bun run build:dts
scripts.build:app: bun build packages/app/src/app.ts --outfile packages/app/dist/index.js --target node --format esm --packages external
scripts.build:base: bun build packages/base/src/index.ts --outfile packages/base/dist/index.js --target node --format esm --packages external
scripts.build:js: bun run build:base && bun run build:app
scripts.publish:packages: bun run build && npm publish --workspace @kit/base --access public && npm publish --workspace @kit/app --access public
